creator: kerry.morse@metrotas.com.au
text:
See ppp.log file below, Basically I rolled the octet counters into the negatives, the ppp software stopped responding, I restarted ppp and away it went.

sec on Tue Aug 31 12:14:09 1999

How-To-Repeat: Throw lots of data into PPP <GRIN>
